title: Android launch/url verification in server and CLI surfaces — reject proof when another app is foreground
description:
Push Android proof targeting checks all the way through the server and top-level CLI so simemu refuses proof when a different package is foreground.

Acceptance criteria:
- server v2 responses expose the verified foreground package after launch/url steps
- CLI proof flows fail when another app or system surface is foreground
- proof commands record the expected and actual Android package in diagnostics
- tests cover contamination by another installed app
acceptanceCriteria: server v2 exposes verified foreground package state
CLI proof flows fail when another app is foreground
diagnostics record expected and actual Android packages
